import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn tokenize(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let ob = string.byte_at(s, i)
    let b = match ob
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        result = list.push(result, v)
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let toks = tokenize(input)
  let a = match toks.get(0)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let b = match toks.get(1)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let s = match toks.get(2)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    1
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut x = a
  mut first = true
  while x < b
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
    x = x + s
  end
  println(out)
end
